class.name: MultiNodeAnimator
class.brief_description: Per-instance animation playback sharing a single Animation resource.
class.description: MultiNodeAnimator shares one Animation resource across all instances, each with independent playback state (time, speed, playing/paused). Position, rotation, and scale tracks drive instance transforms. Value and bezier tracks can target sibling sub-node properties — if the target has a set_instance_X method, the animator calls it per-instance automatically. Supports sync mode for coordinated chain animations with configurable offset.

members.member: The animation resource shared by all instances. Position/rotation/scale tracks drive instance transforms. Value tracks target sibling sub-node properties (e.g., a track targeting "MultiNodeSprite:frame" calls set_instance_frame per instance).
Automatically start playing all instances when the node enters the tree. When disabled, call play_all() or play_instance() manually from a script.

Controls how instance playback is synchronized. None = each instance is independent, controlled via play_instance() and scripts. Sync = all instances share a base clock with chain offsets controlled by sync_offset.

In Sync mode, the fraction of the animation length that each consecutive instance is offset from the previous one. 0.0 = perfect lockstep (all play the same frame). 0.5 = each instance is offset by half the animation length from the previous. 1.0 = wraps fully, equivalent to lockstep.
Global speed multiplier applied to all instances. Stacks with per-instance speed set via set_instance_speed(). 0.0 = paused, 2.0 = double speed.

method.name: play_all
method.description: Start playback on all instances. In Sync mode, applies the chain offset pattern. In None mode, all start from time 0.

method.name: stop_all
method.description: Pause playback on all instances. Playback position is preserved.

method.name: play_instance
method.description: Start playback for a single instance from the specified time.

method.name: stop_instance
method.description: Pause playback for a single instance. Playback position is preserved.

method.name: set_instance_speed
method.description: Set the speed multiplier for a single instance. Stacks with the global speed_scale. Use negative values for reverse playback.

method.name: get_instance_time
method.description: Get the current playback time for a specific instance in seconds.

constants.constant: Each instance is independent. Controlled via play_instance() and scripts.
All instances share a base clock with chain offsets.
